2026-04-01T02:32:59.8576516Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>

2026-04-01T02:33:00.7832195Z text: Support multiple model config slots and set Google AI Studio default to gemini-flash-latest
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7832939Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7833116Z ### Motivation
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7834027Z - Change Google AI Studio default model from `gemini-2.5-pro` to `gemini-flash-latest` to match expected provider behavior.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7835515Z - Fix the reload/save failure by making model settings loading more robust and returning server-persisted data after save.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7837055Z - Prepare the UI and data model for multiple configuration slots so display names can change independently from a stable identifier.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7837949Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7838119Z ### Description
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7840107Z - Updated default model strings to `gemini-flash-latest` in the mobile app defaults and backend runtime fallback (`apps/mobile_chat_app/.../llm_config_service.dart`, `apps/mobile_chat_app/.../model_settings_screen.dart`, and `apps/node_backend/src/llm/llm_service.ts`).
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7843191Z - Refactored `LlmConfig` and `LlmConfigService` to add `slotId`, introduce `fetchConfigs()` (returns a list) while keeping `fetchDefault()` as a helper, and make `save()` return the server-persisted `LlmConfig` and persist `slot_id` in the JSON payload.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7845754Z - Hardened API response parsing by safely converting dynamic maps and model preference structures when constructing `LlmConfig` instances.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7848656Z - Reworked the model settings UI to show a top "Configs" selector row with `ChoiceChip` buttons whose labels are computed from each config's model name (falling back to `Config N`), maintain a stable ID hint, preserve the existing API-key blank-to-keep behavior, and keep state list-based to support future multiple slots.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7850627Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7850803Z ### Testing
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7851440Z - Ran `./tools/init_dev_env.sh` successfully to bootstrap the development environment.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7853167Z - Ran `flutter analyze apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/model_settings_screen.dart apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/llm_config_service.dart` and it completed with no issues.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7854982Z - Installed Node dependencies with `cd apps/node_backend && npm ci` and the command succeeded.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7857908Z - Ran TypeScript type checking with `cd apps/node_backend && npm run type-check` and it completed successfully.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7860600Z - Attempted `dart format` across Dart and TypeScript files which reported errors because a TypeScript file was passed to the Dart formatter, but Dart files were formatted; subsequent toolchain validation (`flutter analyze`, `npm ci`, `npm run type-check`) verified the changes.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7862798Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7862973Z ------
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7863387Z [Codex Task]((chatgpt.com/redacted)
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7864245Z title: Support multiple model config slots and set Google AI Studio default to gemini-flash-latest
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7865398Z body: ### Motivation
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7866335Z - Change Google AI Studio default model from `gemini-2.5-pro` to `gemini-flash-latest` to match expected provider behavior.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7867819Z - Fix the reload/save failure by making model settings loading more robust and returning server-persisted data after save.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7869633Z - Prepare the UI and data model for multiple configuration slots so display names can change independently from a stable identifier.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7870534Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7870702Z ### Description
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7872423Z - Updated default model strings to `gemini-flash-latest` in the mobile app defaults and backend runtime fallback (`apps/mobile_chat_app/.../llm_config_service.dart`, `apps/mobile_chat_app/.../model_settings_screen.dart`, and `apps/node_backend/src/llm/llm_service.ts`).
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7875483Z - Refactored `LlmConfig` and `LlmConfigService` to add `slotId`, introduce `fetchConfigs()` (returns a list) while keeping `fetchDefault()` as a helper, and make `save()` return the server-persisted `LlmConfig` and persist `slot_id` in the JSON payload.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7877806Z - Hardened API response parsing by safely converting dynamic maps and model preference structures when constructing `LlmConfig` instances.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7881123Z - Reworked the model settings UI to show a top "Configs" selector row with `ChoiceChip` buttons whose labels are computed from each config's model name (falling back to `Config N`), maintain a stable ID hint, preserve the existing API-key blank-to-keep behavior, and keep state list-based to support future multiple slots.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7883106Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7883269Z ### Testing
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7883911Z - Ran `./tools/init_dev_env.sh` successfully to bootstrap the development environment.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7885655Z - Ran `flutter analyze apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/model_settings_screen.dart apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/llm_config_service.dart` and it completed with no issues.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7887632Z - Installed Node dependencies with `cd apps/node_backend && npm ci` and the command succeeded.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7889147Z - Ran TypeScript type checking with `cd apps/node_backend && npm run type-check` and it completed successfully.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7891529Z - Attempted `dart format` across Dart and TypeScript files which reported errors because a TypeScript file was passed to the Dart formatter, but Dart files were formatted; subsequent toolchain validation (`flutter analyze`, `npm ci`, `npm run type-check`) verified the changes.
2026-04-01T02:33:00.7893272Z

const substitutePlaceholders = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/substitute_placeholders.cjs');

// Call the substitution function
return await substitutePlaceholders({
  file: process.env.GH_AW_PROMPT,
  substitutions: {
    GH_AW_GITHUB_ACTOR: process.env.GH_AW_GITHUB_ACTOR,

2026-04-01T02:33:01.0881936Z ## Your Task
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0882163Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0882400Z 1. Fetch the list of changed files in this PR.
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0883217Z 2. Read each changed file (focus on `.dart`, `.ts`, `.tsx`, `.js`, and migration SQL files).
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0884116Z 3. Apply the review criteria from the agent instructions.
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0885108Z 4. Post inline review comments only for real issues — do not comment on lines that are fine.
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0885760Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0885941Z ## Review Priorities
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0886214Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0887076Z 1. **Blockers** — security issues, null-safety violations, broken migrations, missing `mounted` guards, `undefined` passed as SQL params
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0888817Z 2. **Correctness** — logic errors, off-by-one errors, unhandled `async` errors
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0890051Z 3. **Convention** — ESM import style (`.js` extensions), Dart Effective Dart rules, missing dartdoc on public APIs
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0891101Z 4. **Tests** — new logic without corresponding tests
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0891523Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0891706Z ## Output Format
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0891946Z

2026-04-01T02:33:01.0893436Z

2026-04-01T02:33:01.0894098Z - Be concise (2–4 sentences max)

2026-04-01T02:33:01.0895075Z - State why it matters
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0895663Z - Suggest the fix
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0895933Z 
2026-04-01T02:33:01.0896176Z If no issues are found, do not post any comments.
